business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy number CP-LSPH-2025-7801, effective 07/01/2025. 1 claim in 2024. No cancellations. Prior carriers: Zurich Insurance Group (2023, premium 423914.72, 0 claims, no cancellation); American International Group (2022, premium 447842.42, 1 claim, no cancellation).

positives: All 8 locations fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R
24-hour doorperson/security on premises at all locations
Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring
Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors
Written contracts maintained with all subcontractors
No OSHA citations in the past 3 years
Short-term rentals (less than 1 year) not permitted
No policy cancellations across 3 prior policy years
24 years in business with 18 years under current management team
No premium-bearing midterm cancellations in prior insurance history
concerns: No formal safety program in place
EV charging stations installed on premises — emerging fire and liability risk
Swimming pools, exercise rooms, or other amenities present — additional premises liability exposure
Plumbing last updated in 2015 — oldest mechanical system on record
LOC-006 (1400 Enclave Parkway, Houston, TX) built in 1995 — oldest building in portfolio
2 claims filed in 3 prior policy years (2022 and 2024)
Operations hours extend to Saturday, expanding premises liability window
No fleet or vehicle information provided — potential gap in submission
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 2022 (American International Group, premium $447,842.42): 1 claim, no cancellation. 2023 (Zurich Insurance Group, premium $423,914.72): 0 claims, no cancellation. 2024 (CNA Financial, premium $414,601.77): 1 claim, no cancellation. Total of 2 claims over 3 years with no policy cancellations.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas. Portfolio consists of 8 locations: LOC-001 (8117 Preston Road, Dallas, TX, 285,000 sq ft, Office, built 2008, sprinklered); LOC-002 (5050 Westheimer Road, Houston, TX, 168,000 sq ft, Office, built 2001, sprinklered); LOC-003 (5060 Westheimer Road, Houston, TX, 142,000 sq ft, Office, built 2003, sprinklered); LOC-004 (7301 Lone Star Drive, Plano, TX, 95,000 sq ft, Mercantile, built 2012, sprinklered); LOC-005 (3200 McKinney Avenue, Dallas, TX, 124,000 sq ft, Mercantile, built 2018, sprinklered); LOC-006 (1400 Enclave Parkway, Houston, TX, 112,000 sq ft, Office, built 1995, sprinklered); LOC-007 (800 8th Avenue, Fort Worth, TX, 78,000 sq ft, Office, built 2015, sprinklered); LOC-008 (1256 Main Street, Southlake, TX, 52,000 sq ft, Mercantile, built 2006, sprinklered). Hours of operation: Monday–Saturday, 7:00 AM–7:00 PM. 145 full-time employees and 28 part-time employees. Annual revenue: $67,000,000.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: No formal safety program in place. Written contracts with indemnification clauses required from all contractors. Written contracts maintained with all subcontractors. Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring. All buildings fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R. 24-hour doorperson/security on premises. No OSHA citations in the past 3 years. Last system updates: Plumbing 2015, HVAC 2018, Electrical 2023.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: 2022 (American International Group, premium $447,842.42): 1 claim, no cancellation. 2023 (Zurich Insurance Group, premium $423,914.72): 0 claims, no cancellation. 2024 (CNA Financial, premium $414,601.77): 1 claim, no cancellation. No additional narrative detail on claim nature or severity provided in submission.
